brand.notes: Only entries tied to official Samsung support pages or official Samsung manual download links were included. Board serials and wiring are left empty where Samsung public support sources did not expose them.

service_identity.notes: Use full model code and rating-label suffix for part matching.

faults.title: Water supply error
faults.description: The washer detected a filling problem, commonly related to blocked or kinked water supply hoses.
faults.cause: Water supply path restricted or unavailable.
checks: Check the mesh filter at the hose connection

source.name: Samsung support: Resolve 4C, 4E, NF or NF1 error codes on your Samsung washing machine

faults.title: Motor error
faults.description: Samsung identifies 3E / 3C / E3 as a motor-related error family.
faults.cause: Motor or motor-control related fault condition.
checks: If the code repeats, inspect motor system and service documentation

source.name: Samsung washing machine information and error codes

faults.title: Unbalanced load
faults.description: Samsung states these indicate an unbalanced load in the drum.
checks: Make sure the appliance is level
Avoid spinning a single heavy item alone

source.name: Samsung UK: What do the codes on my washing machine mean?

faults.title: Drain error
faults.description: Samsung states 5E or 5C indicates a drainage problem, often from a blocked filter or kinked drain hose.
checks: Remove blockage in hose or pump filter area

source.name: Samsung support: How to fix the washing machine with 5C error?

documents.title: Samsung user manual / quick guide PDF listed on support page

faults.title: Door issue
faults.description: Official Samsung support lists these as door-related issues.
faults.cause: Door not latched or obstruction at the door.
checks: Remove fabric trapped in the door
